title: AI boom or bubble? Indonesia must choose readiness over hype - ANTARA News
body: 1 month ago - On infrastructure, Indonesia's trajectory is encouraging. Data centre capacity in Southeast Asia is projected to triple from 2025 levels by 2030, driven by a tenfold surge in AI use, according to a KPMG report.
